privileged_info_summary: The target website https://books.toscrape.com/ is a real, publicly accessible web scraping practice sandbox (HTTP 200, 2240 lines of HTML). All four custom link position XPath selectors are valid for the target website: //header selects the page header, //footer selects the footer, //div[contains(@class, "side_categories")] selects the sidebar with product categories, and //div[contains(@class, "col-sm-8")] selects the main content area. The expected output file names (inlinks_by_position.csv and link_distribution_report.txt) are hardcoded in the task scripts. The data is real, not synthetic.
